author: mj12albert
body:
Allows these states to be controlled by external libraries, both react-hook-form and Tanstack form provide these two states in their API

This is useful as Tanstack form treats "dirty" differently from RHF and other libraries: https://tanstack.com/form/latest/docs/framework/react/guides/basic-concepts#understanding-isdirty-in-different-libraries

- [x] I have followed (at least) the [PR section of the contributing guide](https://github.com/mui/base-ui/blob/HEAD/CONTRIBUTING.md#sending-a-pull-request).
title: [field] Add `dirty` and `touched` props
